name: Stir Fry Rice and Beef
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooked Extra Long Grain Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into thin slices, about 1 inch long.
2. Cut the onions into wedges and the peppers into thin strips, removing seeds.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a wok over high heat. Add the meat and garlic. Stir-fry until the meat is brown and tender, about 5 minutes. Remove from the wok.
4. Heat another tablespoon of oil in the wok over medium-high heat. Add the onions and peppers. Stir-fry until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 2 minutes.
5. Add the remaining meat and rice to the vegetables. Combine all remaining ingredients in a saucepan, bring to a boil, then simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Pour the mixture over the rice, meat, and vegetables. Stir-fry until well mixed; serve warm.
